title: 18] To consider the nominations of: Mr. Platte B....
description: Full Committee Hearing on September 18, 2025 at 6:00 AM
text:
Full Committee Hearing
To consider the nominations of: Mr. Platte B. Moring III to be Inspector General, Department of Defense; Ms. Kirsten A. Davies to be Chief Information Officer of the Department of Defense; Mr. James G. Mazol to be Deputy Under Secretary of Defense for Research and Engineering; and Mr. Derrick M. Anderson to be Assistant Secretary of Defense for Special Operations and Low-Intensity Conflict
